name: CreditCard

unions.name: Field
unions.comment: Union type of all creditcard fields.

unions.name: Issuer
unions.comment: The list of identified credit card issuers. If not identifies, the issuer is set to Other.

unions.name: Valid
unions.comment: Usually set to NotTested. When testing a field it's set to Tested True or Tested False, depending on the result of the test.

unions.name: YearFormat
unions.comment:
Year formatting fot the expiration. It can be set to:
    - 2 digits: mm/yy
    - 4 digits: mm/yyyy
    - 2 or 4 digits: both values are accepted, but not mm/yyy (it doesn't mean anything)
Update, and validation functions use this to control expiration value.

aliases.name: CreditCard
aliases.comment: The main model for this package.
aliases.type: { holderName : Field, holderEmail : Field, number : Field, expiration : Field, cvc : Field, issuer : Maybe Issuer }

values.name: displayField
values.comment: The function to display the card number with a space every 4 numbers.

values.name: fieldValue
values.comment: A helper to return the raw string value of a given field.

values.name: initCreditCard
values.comment: The function to initialize a new credit card model.

values.name: initCreditCardDefault
values.comment: Initialiaze a new credit card with default values

values.name: isValid
values.comment: A helper to render the validation state of a field.

values.name: update
values.comment: The updating function for this package.
